Notice Of Unopposed And Stipulated Motion And Joint Motion For Release Of Interplead Funds; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities
Off Calendar Jul-17-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

INTERVENOR FEE TITLE INC.'s Notice Of Unopposed And Stipulated Motion And Joint Motion For Release Of Interplead Funds.

Plaintiff-in-Intervention Fee Title, Inc.'s Unopposed Motion and Joint Motion For Release Of Interplead Funds is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, as to the interplead funds on deposit with the court in connection with this action, the court orders the Clerk of the Court to: (1) distribute $7,500.00 to Plaintiff ASSET EXCHANGE COMPANY, LLC; (2) distribute the remainder of the interplead funds on deposit ($113,996.00, plus accrued interest due) to Plaintiff-in-Intervention FEE TITLE, INC.

Notably, the motion refers to a judgment. This is not a judgment. The parties will need to secure a separate judgment, as appropriate.

Order is signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)

PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ORDER OF DISCHARGE AND AWARD OF COSTS AND ATTORNEYS' FEES is GRANTED as requested. No opposition filed. Costs and fees awarded in the amount of $5,436.46 which will be deducted from the $121,495.11 held by the Court.
